mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM jsh_material_category WHERE COALESCE(delete_flag, '0') != '1' ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: update jsh_material_category set update_time=#{updateTime}, parent_id=#{parentId},sort=#{sort},serial_no=#{serialNo}, name=#{name},remark=#{remark} where id =#{id} and id != 1 and COALESCE(delete_flag, '0') != '1'
